benefitsPage.title: Your Benefits at a Glance
benefitsPage.description: Explore the complete range of benefits available to RS&H employees.

benefitChapters.title: Eligibility & Enrollment
benefitChapters.description: Overview of who qualifies for benefits, enrollment deadlines, qualifying life events, and how to make changes.

children.text: Benefits are available to all full-time and part-time associates working a minimum of 20 hours per week and their eligible dependents.
If you enroll during Open Enrollment, your benefits become effective January 1, 2026. New hire benefits become effective the first day of the month following your date of hire.
You may only change elections during Open Enrollment or when you experience a qualifying life event. Changes due to a qualifying life event must be made within 30 days of that event.
Eligible Dependents
Spouse or Domestic Partner
Children from birth to age 26 (includes natural, legally adopted, stepchildren, and unmarried dependent children of any age who are mentally or physically disabled and dependent on you for support)
How to Enroll — Open Enrollment
Visit Blaze and select the UKG icon.
Navigate to Menu > Myself > Open Enrollment.
How to Enroll — New Hire or Newly Eligible
Visit Blaze and select the UKG icon.
Navigate to Menu > Myself > Life Events > I am Enrolling in Benefits.
Qualifying Life Events
Birth, legal adoption, or placement for adoption
Change in marital status
Dependent child reaches age 26
Spouse gains or loses employment or eligibility with current employer
Death of a covered dependent
Spouse or dependent becomes eligible or ineligible for Medicare/Medicaid or SCHIP
Change in residence that changes eligibility for coverage
Court-ordered change

rows.label: New Hire
cells: Must enroll within 10 days of hire
1st day of the month following date of hire

rows.label: Qualified Life Event
cells: Changes must be made within 30 days of life event

benefitChapters.title: Medical & Prescription Drug
benefitChapters.description: BlueCross BlueShield medical coverage with three plan options: PPO, Prime HDHP (HSA-eligible), and Alternate HDHP (HSA-eligible), plus comprehensive prescription drug coverage.

children.text: Your medical benefits are provided by BlueCross BlueShield and include coverage for both in-network and out-of-network providers. All plans participate in the same network.
Choosing an in-network provider provides significant savings. The PPO Plan is not HSA-eligible; the Prime HDHP and Alternate HDHP plans are HSA-eligible.
Schedule your annual wellness visit with an in-network provider — it's covered at no cost to you.
Pharmacy Tips
Find an in-network pharmacy or use the drug cost estimator at www.optumrx.com.
Discount sites like GoodRx and WellRx provide instant savings (note: prescriptions acquired under these plans do not go through your insurance).
Ask your provider or pharmacist if a generic or mail order option is available.
Generic contraceptives and diaphragms are covered in full.

tables.tableDescription: This is a summary of coverage. In-network services are based on negotiated charges.

benefitChapters.title: Dental
benefitChapters.description: MetLife dental coverage with Core and Enhanced plan options, covering preventive, basic, major, and orthodontia services for in-network and out-of-network providers.

children.text: Dental plans cover diagnostic and preventive care, plus basic and major services. Although you can choose any dental provider, you will generally pay less when you visit an in-network dentist.
To locate an in-network provider, visit www.metlife.com/dental.
Associates can elect dental coverage regardless of their medical enrollment status.
MetLife Plus Dentist Advantages
Quality Assurance: Dentists are monitored for proper licensing, cleanliness and safety.
No balance billing: You won't be charged more than the contracted rate.
No pre-payment: You'll pay only your portion of the bill — insurance pays your dentist directly.
Lower prices: Through reduced fees.

tables.tableDescription: Adult orthodontia is available on the Enhanced Plan only. Coinsurance amounts reflect what the employee pays.

benefitChapters.title: Vision
benefitChapters.description: VSP vision coverage with Core and Enhanced plan options, covering eye exams, frames, lenses, contact lenses, and laser surgery discounts.

children.text: Vision benefits include coverage for eye exams, lenses and frames, contact lenses, and discounts for laser surgery.
The vision plan is built around network providers who offer higher benefits at lower cost. Use an in-network provider for the most value.
Associates can elect vision coverage regardless of their medical enrollment status.
Your annual Well Vision Exam can help detect early signs of health issues like diabetes and high blood pressure.

benefitChapters.title: Associate Payroll Contributions
benefitChapters.description: Bi-weekly employee premium contributions for medical, dental, and vision plans across all coverage tiers.

children.text: The following tables show the bi-weekly payroll deduction amounts you pay for each benefit plan and coverage tier.
Additional rate information can be found in your enrollment portal.

benefitChapters.title: Health Savings Account (HSA)
benefitChapters.description: Tax-advantaged HSA available to associates enrolled in the Prime or Alternate HDHP, with RS&H employer contributions and managed through Fidelity NetBenefits.

children.text: A Health Savings Account (HSA) is designed to be paired with a qualified High Deductible Health Plan (HDHP) and provides a smart way to save for current and future healthcare needs.
HSA offers a Triple Tax Advantage: contributions are tax-free, interest earned is tax-free, and withdrawals for qualified health expenses are tax-free.
Access and manage your HSA through your Fidelity NetBenefit account at NetBenefits.com.
You can make changes to your contribution amount anytime throughout the year through the benefit portal.
HSA Eligibility Requirements
You are enrolled in the HDHP (Prime or Alternate).
You are not covered by a spouse's plan.
No one else can claim you as a dependent.
You are not enrolled in Medicare, TRICARE, or TRICARE for Life.
You have not received VA benefits in the past 3 months.
HSA Advantages
Use the account to pay for qualified healthcare expenses.
Unspent dollars roll over each year and are yours to keep, even if you retire or leave the company.
You can invest your HSA funds so your available healthcare dollars can grow over time.

benefitChapters.title: Flexible Spending Account (FSA)
benefitChapters.description: Tax-advantaged FSA options for healthcare, limited purpose (dental/vision for HDHP enrollees), and dependent care expenses, administered through Fidelity.

children.text: A flexible spending account (FSA) is a tax-advantaged account that reimburses you for qualified healthcare or dependent care expenses using pre-tax dollars.
HDHP Prime and HDHP Alternate enrollees may only use a Limited Purpose FSA for eligible dental and vision expenses.
Eligible claims must be incurred between January 1 and December 31. All claims must be submitted by March 15.
Up to $660 of unused funds from the prior year may roll over into the new plan year. Any unused amount above $660 is forfeited.
Transit and Parking FSAs allow pre-tax contributions of up to $340 per month each for 2026 and may be enrolled at any time during the year.

rows.label: Eligibility
cells: Associates enrolled in PPO or waived medical coverage

rows.label: Eligible Expenses
cells: Medical, dental, vision, and other qualified health expenses (see IRS Publication 502)
Care for dependent children under 13, dependents over 13 unable to self-care, or elderly parents in your home

benefitChapters.title: Life Insurance
benefitChapters.description: RS&H provides Basic Life and AD&D at no cost through Mutual of Omaha, plus optional Voluntary Life and AD&D coverage for associates, spouses, and dependents.

children.text: RS&H provides Basic Life Insurance and Accidental Death & Dismemberment (AD&D) at no cost to you in the amount of your annual salary (up to $1,000,000) through Mutual of Omaha.
Coverage is automatic but you must designate a beneficiary. Please be sure your beneficiary is up to date.
At age 65, your life insurance amount begins to reduce by a percentage of the original coverage amount.
Voluntary Life insurance is available to you, your spouse, and your dependent children for additional coverage.
AD&D — How It Pays
Death: If your death is caused by an accident, the AD&D benefit pays in addition to your life insurance (your beneficiary receives both).
Dismemberment: If you lose a covered body part or its function due to an accident, you may receive a percentage of the total AD&D benefit.

tables.tableTitle: Basic Life Insurance — Age Reduction Schedule

tables.tableDescription: If you don't enroll when first available or elect above Guaranteed Issue, Evidence of Insurability (EOI) is required.

rows.label: Child Only
cells: 15% of your total coverage amount per child

benefitChapters.title: Disability Insurance
benefitChapters.description: Short-Term and Long-Term Disability coverage through Mutual of Omaha, providing income protection when you are unable to work due to illness or injury.

children.text: Short-Term Disability (STD) insurance through Mutual of Omaha provides income protection on a short-term basis. The Core Plan is provided by RS&H at no cost. A Buy-Up Plan is available for additional protection.
Long-Term Disability (LTD) insurance provides lasting income protection if you are unable to return to work. This coverage is provided by RS&H at no cost through Mutual of Omaha.
Don't wait — file your claim as soon as possible after your disability begins to avoid delays in benefit payments.

tables.tableDescription: *Pre-existing exclusion: No coverage for disability in the first six months if you received treatment for that condition in the three months before coverage began.

rows.label: Your cost
cells: Provided by RS&H at no cost

rows.label: When benefits begin
cells: After 7 calendar days of inability to work
After 7 calendar days of inability to work

rows.label: How much it pays
cells: 60% of income up to $3,500 per week
Additional 30% of income up to $2,000 per week

rows.label: Your cost
cells: Provided by RS&H at no cost

rows.label: When benefits begin
cells: After 180 calendar days of inability to work

rows.label: How much it pays
cells: 60% of income up to $20,000 per month

rows.label: How long payments last
cells: Up to your Social Security Normal Retirement Age if you remain unable to work

benefitChapters.title: Voluntary Benefits — Supplemental Health
benefitChapters.description: Accident Insurance and Critical Illness & Cancer Insurance through Mutual of Omaha, designed to cover out-of-pocket expenses from covered accidents or diagnoses.

children.text: These supplemental health options protect your family's finances in case of an unforeseen injury or illness. Both plans are offered through Mutual of Omaha.
Accident Insurance helps ease the financial pain of a covered accident — payments are made directly to you based on injuries and treatments.
Critical Illness coverage pays a lump sum benefit regardless of any medical insurance in place; funds are yours to use at your discretion.
You may take both policies with you if you retire or leave RS&H.
Accident Insurance Highlights
Family coverage is available.
Medical questions are never required.
Coverage pays per covered accident; no limitation on the number of accidents.
You may take this policy with you if you retire or leave RS&H.
Critical Illness — Covered Conditions
Cancer
Stroke
Heart Attack
Coronary Bypass Surgery
Major Organ Transplant
Advanced Parkinson's
Advanced Alzheimer's
End Stage Renal Failure (pays at 25%)
Childhood and Developmental conditions
And more

tables.tableDescription: Service is payable when treatment is sought due to a covered accident.

rows.label: Health Screening Benefit (per person, per year)

tables.tableTitle: Critical Illness & Cancer Insurance — Benefit Amounts
tables.tableDescription: Your cost depends on age, coverage tier, and tobacco status. Children are covered at no additional cost.

benefitChapters.title: 401(k) Retirement Savings Plan
benefitChapters.description: RS&H 401(k) plan with 50% company match up to 6% of pay, Roth option, automatic enrollment at 6%, and a five-year vesting schedule administered through Fidelity.

children.text: The RS&H 401(k) plan allows you to contribute part of your salary toward retirement while deferring taxes. You can save up to 75% of your base pay with before-tax contributions, subject to IRS limits.
A Roth 401(k) option is available with post-tax contributions. You can also contribute up to 75% of base pay to Roth, subject to IRS limits.
All associates over age 18, including temporary and part-time, are eligible to participate.
RS&H makes a 50% matching contribution on the amount of your contribution, up to 6% of your pay. 2/3 of the match is contributed in cash each pay period; 1/3 is contributed in company stock annually.
Example: An associate earning $75,000 contributing 6% contributes $4,500. RS&H matches $2,250 ($1,500 in cash + $750 in company stock).
You have the option to rollover 401(k) funds from a previous employer. Contact Fidelity at 800.835.5095.
Automatic Enrollment
All new associates are automatically enrolled at 6% of pay (pre-tax).
Default investment: T. Rowe Price Target Date Retirement Funds matched to your age.
You have approximately 45 days from your date of hire to contact Fidelity to opt out or change your deferral amount.
Contact Fidelity at NetBenefits.com or by calling 800.835.5095.
Employee Ownership Opportunities
401(k) Plan — Stock Match & Supplemental Contributions
Annual Stock Offerings
Incentive Programs

tables.tableDescription: 940 hours worked in a calendar year equals one Year of Service. Your own contributions are always 100% vested.

benefitChapters.title: Employee Assistance Program (EAP)
benefitChapters.description: Confidential 24/7 support through Health Advocate, offering six free visits per incident with licensed professionals covering a wide range of personal, family, and financial challenges.

children.text: RS&H offers all associates and their families access to a confidential Employee Assistance Program (EAP) through Health Advocate, available 24/7.
Six free visits (virtual or in person) with licensed professionals per incident.
Health Advocate also provides Core Advocacy services to assist with benefits questions, claim resolution, medical bill explanation, finding providers, and making appointments.
Contact Health Advocate at 1.866.799.2728 or www.healthadvocate.com/members. Reference Plan: RS&H.
EAP Services Include
Mental health: anxiety, depression, stress, eating disorders, post-traumatic stress disorder
Substance use: alcohol, smoking
Family: adoption, child and elder care, divorce and child custody, marriage
Financial: debt and bankruptcy, buying a car or home, wills
Health: cancer, diabetes, fitness, dieting, heart health, pregnancy
Life events: grieving, military life, student life, hurricane preparedness
And more

benefitChapters.title: Additional Voluntary Benefits
benefitChapters.description: Supplemental programs including Identity Theft Protection, Pet Insurance, Legal Plan, and Auto Insurance to support your everyday life beyond core medical coverage.

children.text: Your well-being goes beyond medical coverage. Take advantage of these extra benefits designed to support your everyday life.

Allstate Identity Protection provides identity, financial account, and tri-bureau credit monitoring; dark web and social media monitoring; 24/7 alerts and fraud recovery; phishing protection; military-grade VPN; password manager; and personal device protection tools.
Up to $1 million in identity theft expense reimbursement, or $2 million per family. Family coverage includes anyone 'under roof, under wallet' — parents, grandparents, college kids, or dependents.
Associate Only: $9.50/month | Associate + Family: $17.50/month
Contact: 1.800.789.2720 | www.myaip.com/rsandh
Pet insurance through PetPartners covers dogs and cats. Get reimbursed for veterinary bills including accidents, illnesses, injuries, and cancer coverage.
Enroll anytime at www.petpartners.com/enroll?p=RSandH. Apply discount code 'RSH10' and enroll under partner name 'RS and H'.
Contact: 866.774.1113 | help@petpartners.com
MetLaw covers you, your spouse, and dependents for a flat monthly fee. Includes unlimited telephone and office consultations with an attorney.
Services include estate planning, immigration assistance, document preparation & review, elder law, and family law.
Bi-weekly cost: $10.38
Contact: 1.800.821.6400 | info.legalplans.com
RS&H offers associates the opportunity to purchase auto insurance through Farmers GroupSelect at discounted group rates.
Pay through convenient payroll deductions. Coverage may be kept if you change jobs.

benefitChapters.title: Paid Time Off & Holidays
benefitChapters.description: RS&H provides 8 paid holidays plus a floating holiday, vacation accrual based on tenure, personal leave, leave bank, paid parental leave, and bereavement leave.

children.text: RS&H believes time away is necessary to allow you to refresh yourself physically and mentally.
Benefit-eligible associates receive paid time off for 8 observed holidays plus one floating holiday per accrual year.
Vacation allowance is based on your tenure with RS&H and credited on your date of hire and each January thereafter.
Personal Leave (PL) is available for personal illness, family emergencies, medical appointments, and other situations. Unused PL transfers to a Leave Bank (max 240 hours).
Observed Holidays
New Year's Day
Martin Luther King Jr. Day
Memorial Day
Independence Day
Labor Day
Thanksgiving
Day after Thanksgiving
Christmas Day
Floating Holiday (1 additional day per accrual year)
Additional Leave
Paid Parental Leave: Up to 2 weeks paid leave per birth or adoption (child aged 17 and under). Associates with accrued Leave Bank hours may use up to 40 additional hours for a third week.
Bereavement Leave: Up to 3 days for the death or imminent death of immediate family members.
Jury Duty: Paid leave based on standard working hours.
Flexible Work Arrangements: Available as an additional benefit.

tables.tableDescription: Full vacation allowance is credited at the beginning of each calendar year. New hires receive a prorated value based on hire date.

openEnrollment.title: Your 2026 Benefits
openEnrollment.description: Your Journey. Your Rewards. Our Shared Future.
openEnrollment.statusDescription: Review and update your selections now

benefitChangesPage.title: What's New This Year
benefitChangesPage.description: Review the latest changes and improvements to your benefits package.
benefitChangesPage.alertMessage: Review all changes before making your elections during open enrollment.

changes.title: Super Catch-Up Contribution (Ages 60–63)
changes.description: Associates aged 60–63 are now eligible for the Super Catch-Up contribution limit of $35,750 per year for the 401(k) plan.

changes.title: Enhanced Dental Plan — Annual Maximum Increase
changes.description: The Enhanced Dental Plan annual maximum has increased to $2,500 per person (in-network and out-of-network).

changes.title: HSA Employer Contributions
changes.description: RS&H contributes $600/$1,200 (Associate/All Others) for Prime HDHP and $800/$1,400 for Alternate HDHP enrollees.

enrollmentChecklist.title: Enrollment Checklist
enrollmentChecklist.description: Use this step-by-step checklist to prepare for open enrollment.

items.title: Determine Your Eligibility
items.description: Full-time and part-time associates working minimum 20 hours per week are eligible. New hires must enroll within 10 days of hire.

items.title: Review Your Benefit Options
items.description: Use ALEX at start.myalex.com/rsh to get personalized guidance on which plans make the most sense for you.

items.title: Enroll via the Benefits Portal
items.description: Visit Blaze, select the UKG icon, then navigate to Menu > Myself > Open Enrollment (or Life Events > I am Enrolling in Benefits for new hires).

items.title: Designate Your Beneficiaries
items.description: Ensure your beneficiary is up to date for life insurance, AD&D, and retirement accounts.

items.title: Set Up HSA or FSA Contributions
items.description: If enrolling in an HDHP, set up your HSA contribution amount in the benefit portal. FSA elections are also made during enrollment.

items.title: Set Your 401(k) Contribution
items.description: You are automatically enrolled at 6%. Visit NetBenefits.com or call 800.835.5095 within 45 days of hire to adjust or opt out.

enrollmentChecklist.ctaDescription: Once you've completed this checklist, you're ready to make your benefit elections.

retirementPlanning.heroDescription: RS&H helps you build long-term financial security through a 401(k) plan with a 50% company match up to 6% of your pay, Roth option, and employee ownership opportunities — all administered through Fidelity.

sections.title: Company Match
sections.content: RS&H matches 50% of your contributions up to 6% of your pay. 2/3 of the match is contributed in cash per pay period; 1/3 is contributed in company stock annually.

sections.title: Vesting
sections.content: You become fully vested in RS&H contributions after 5 years of service. Your own contributions and their growth are always 100% vested.

sections.title: Employee Ownership
sections.content: Employee ownership is a bedrock principle at RS&H. Associates can participate through the 401(k) Stock Match, Annual Stock Offerings, and Incentive Programs.
